actions.value:
In this case, it could be that your wallet was out-of-sync beforehand, causing an outdated balance to appear. This can happen when your device's internet connection has been spotty or inconsistent. After a resync is fully completed, the transaction history on your device will match all of the data on the blockchain for this wallet. 

 

Please check your transaction history for this wallet after a resync has completed, and review for the inputs and outputs to account for all coin movements. To view transaction history:

  1. Open Edge and log into your account
  2. Tap 'View Assets' to navigate to your 'Assets' page, and tap into the wallet you want to review
  3. Scroll down to view all transaction history associated with this wallet

 

After reviewing the recent transactions, please let us know if you still have any questions or concerns.
